merge_presets.label: TypeScript strict mode
merge_presets.value:
- Use TypeScript strict mode. Prefer explicit types at all public API boundaries.
- Never use `any` — use `unknown` and narrow with type guards.
- Use named exports exclusively. Avoid default exports.
- Use async/await throughout. Never use .then() chains or callbacks.

merge_presets.label: React/Next.js frontend
merge_presets.description: Frontend application built with React or Next.js
merge_presets.value: This is a modern frontend application built with React or Next.js. The application provides a responsive user interface, handles client-side state management, and communicates with backend APIs.
